Bash(powershell -File - << 'PSEOF'
[xml]$xml = Get-Content 'c:\\Users\\wkkim\\Downloads\\pptx_extracted\\ppt\\slides\\slide2.xml' -Encoding UTF8
$shapes = $xml.sld.cSld.spTree.sp
foreach \($sp in $shapes\) {
    $name = $sp.nvSpPr.cNvPr.name
    $xfrm = $sp.spPr.xfrm
    $off = $xfrm.off
    $ext = $xfrm.ext
    $texts = \($sp.txBody.p | ForEach-Object { \($_.r | ForEach-Object { $_.t }\) -join '' }\) -join ' | '
    $fill = $sp.spPr.solidFill.srgbClr.val
    Write-Host "[$name] x=$\($off.x\) y=$\($off.y\) w=$\($ext.cx\) h=$\($ext.cy\) fill=#$fill | $texts"
}
PSEOF)
